preReview.title: Columbus Crew v New York Red Bulls: Nancy looking for ‘collective’ contribution ahead of playoffs
preReview.description: The Columbus Crew will be hoping to end their regular-season by snapping their four-game winless run when they host the New York Red Bulls.

preReview.title: Columbus Crew contra New York Red Bulls: Nancy busca una contribución 'colectiva' antes de los playoffs
preReview.description: El Columbus Crew espera terminar su temporada regular rompiendo su racha de cuatro partidos sin ganar cuando reciban a los New York Red Bulls.

preReview.title: Columbus Crew v New York Red Bulls: Nancy cerca il contributo 'collettivo' prima dei playoff
preReview.description: I Columbus Crew sperano di chiudere la stagione regolare interrompendo la loro striscia di quattro partite senza vittorie quando ospiteranno i New York Red Bulls.

preReview.title: Columbus Crew x New York Red Bulls: Nancy busca contribuição ‘coletiva’ antes dos playoffs
preReview.description: O Columbus Crew espera encerrar sua temporada regular quebrando uma sequência de quatro jogos sem vitória ao receber o New York Red Bulls.

preReview.title: Columbus Crew v New York Red Bulls : Nancy recherche une contribution « collective » avant les playoffs
preReview.description: Le Columbus Crew espère terminer sa saison régulière en mettant fin à sa série de quatre matchs sans victoire en accueillant les New York Red Bulls.

preReview.title: Columbus Crew gegen New York Red Bulls: Nancy hofft auf kollektiven Beitrag vor den Playoffs
preReview.description: Die Columbus Crew hoffen, ihre reguläre Saison zu beenden, indem sie ihre vier Spiele andauernde sieglose Serie beenden, wenn sie die New York Red Bulls empfangen.

preReview.title: كولومبوس كرو ضد نيويورك ريد بولز: نانسي يبحث عن مساهمة 'جماعية' قبل المباريات الإقصائية
preReview.description: يأمل فريق كولومبوس كرو في إنهاء موسمهم العادي بكسر سلسلة أربع مباريات دون فوز عندما يستضيفون نيويورك ريد بولز.

preReview.title: Columbus Crew x New York Red Bulls: Nancy busca contribuição ‘coletiva’ antes dos playoffs
preReview.description: O Columbus Crew espera encerrar sua temporada regular rompendo sua sequência de quatro jogos sem vencer ao receber o New York Red Bulls.

QAData.question: Who won between Columbus Crew and New York Red Bulls on Sat, 18 Oct 2025 22:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Columbus Crew won 3–1 over New York Red Bulls on Sat, 18 Oct 2025 22:00:00 GMT.
